name: Un utilisateur non authentifié est redirigé vers la page de connexion lorsqu'il tente d'accéder aux routes protégées

steps.name: Ouvrir l'application sur la page de connexion

retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "https://account.sandbox-paymium.com/deposit/BTC"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    33 × unexpected value "https://account.sandbox-paymium.com/deposit/BTC"

items.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /\/sign-in\?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fiban/
Received string:  "https://account.sandbox-paymium.com/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"
Timeout: 10000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms
    13 × unexpected value "https://account.sandbox-paymium.com/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"

Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /\/sign-in\?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fiban/
Received string:  "https://account.sandbox-paymium.com/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"
